description: Goal: implement the durable entity spine. Change: CodeMap, ModuleMap, FunctionMap, RootMap, NamespaceStore, reference-before-definition placeholders, reverse lookups, namespace save/restore, and prelude_head. Check: tests cover stable IDs, placeholder fill, duplicate references, namespace shadow/restore, and first-match lookup.
title: Compiler2 core: implement CodeMap, identity maps, and namespace heads
